title: phyllanthus graveolens
intro: Phyllanthus graveolens, also known as Phyllanthus niruri or stonebreaker, is a small, herbaceous plant belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which help to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and combat infections. The health benefits of Phyllanthus graveolens include its ability to improve liver function, boost the immune system, and treat various diseases such as hepatitis and malaria. Phyllanthus graveolens can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
